headlines.title: Yen holds near 160 as Japan signals readiness for action
Japanese Yen: Consolidation inside tight range versus US Dollar – UOB
Japan’s record yen defence drains foreign reserves
Japan shares lower at close of trade; Nikkei 225 down 1.26%
'Black Friday' Sweeps Korean Stocks, SK Hynix Plunges Nearly 10%, Samsung Electronics Drops Over 6%
Japanese Shares End Lower on Friday as Global Technology Stocks Slip
Japan stocks lower at close of trade; Nikkei 225 down 1.26%

marketTone.ko: 오늘 일본 증시는 글로벌 기술주 하락의 영향으로 닛케이 225 지수가 1.26% 내리며 하락 마감했습니다. 엔화는 달러 대비 160엔 선에 근접한 수준을 유지했으며, 일본 당국은 개입 준비 태세를 시사했습니다. 한편, 기록적인 엔화 방어 노력으로 외환보유액이 소진되었다는 소식이 전해지며 엔화 약세에 대한 우려가 지속되고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Today, the Japanese stock market closed lower, with the Nikkei 225 down 1.26%, primarily influenced by a broader slip in global technology stocks. The yen remained a key focus, holding near 160 against the dollar as Japan signaled readiness for potential intervention. Concerns persist regarding the yen's weakness, especially after record defense efforts have reportedly drained foreign reserves.
